subject: Kabu, Galar Gym Leader, standing arms-crossed in a sports stadium before a large crowd
description: A humanoid figure stands with arms folded across their chest in a confident, composed posture. The figure wears a white short-sleeved shirt and dark lower garments, and faces the viewer at a slight three-quarter angle. Behind them, stadium bleachers are packed with a dense crowd rendered in warm reds and oranges, suggesting a large competitive arena event. The overall composition is mid-shot with the figure occupying the center foreground against the crowded stadium background.
foreground: standing humanoid figure with arms crossed, short dark hair, white shirt
background: packed stadium bleachers filled with spectators
emotion: calm confidence, arms folded, composed stance
